commit.message:
fix: restrict High Odds to Kalshi/Polymarket; fix close_time datetime type

- find_near_certainty_markets: skip sportsbook platforms (DraftKings,
  FanDuel, BetMGM, Caesars, Pinnacle) — their decimal odds prices are
  not comparable to a 0-1 probability price
- NearCertaintyMarket.close_time: accept datetime | str | None so Pydantic
  does not raise a ValidationError when contracts carry a datetime object
  instead of a pre-serialised ISO string (was crashing the scan cycle)

commit.message:
Fix form-first domain classification: code requests always route to Coding

Root cause: 'I want code to book a flight' was routing to Travel because
content signals ('flight', 'Indigo') beat the form signal ('code').

Fixes:
- Add FORM-FIRST OVERRIDE rule at the top of domain disambiguation that
  checks for code-request signals BEFORE subject-matter signals
- Include 5 concrete misclassification examples with correct answers
- Update _LEVEL_GUIDANCE for domain to emphasize form-over-subject
- Strengthen Coding domain description in intent_tree with form-first rule
  and explicit contrasts (code to book flight → Coding; book me a flight → Travel)
- Update Travel domain to explicitly exclude code requests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

v0.8.0: Add device characterization module for Sebastian's workflow

New nsram.characterize module — complete device characterization suite:

Transient Analysis:
- simulate_pulse_response(): body voltage VB(t) from drain pulse, tau extraction
- firing_frequency_map(): 2D f(Vg1, Vds) heat map (Nature Fig 3)

Synaptic Plasticity:
- simulate_ltp_ltd(): multi-pulse potentiation/depression (Nature Fig 4)
  7 distinct conductance levels, linearity metrics
- paired_pulse_ratio(): PPF/PPD at variable intervals

Lifetime & Reliability:
- simulate_retention(): Arrhenius-accelerated decay at multiple temperatures
  300K: tau=10,139s (matches Pazos >10^4s), Ea extraction: 0.701eV
- simulate_endurance(): BVpar/Is degradation over 10^5+ cycles

Energy Analysis:
- energy_per_spike(): I×V×dt decomposition (generation + integration)
- energy_comparison_table(): NS-RAM vs CMOS/RRAM/PCM

98 public exports across 16 modules.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: replace LIKE search with PostgreSQL full-text search on Listings

Migration adds a tsvector SearchVector column maintained by a
BEFORE INSERT OR UPDATE trigger (listings_search_update). Fields
weighted: Title(A) City(B) Address(C) Description(D). GIN index
ensures sub-millisecond lookups at scale.

ListingService.SearchAsync now uses SearchVector.Matches(PlainToTsQuery)
instead of .Contains() LIKE calls, hitting the GIN index directly.

Tests: shared TestDbContext helper ignores NpgsqlTsVector (unsupported
by InMemory provider) so all 52 unit tests continue to pass.

commit.message:
Fix grayscale editor preview: domain mismatch, MHC layer preservation, stale data

SDR shader grayscale operated in sRGB gamma space while MHC 1D LUT operates
in linear space — preview indexed the curve at wrong brightness levels.
Restructured into linear-domain helpers (ApplyGrayscaleCorrectionLinear,
Apply24GammaLinear) with single sRGB decode/encode roundtrip.

HDR preview forced ICtCp path (luminance-based) while MHC applies per-channel
PQ corrections — visible mismatch on colored content. Switched to PQ/linear
gain path matching MHC behavior.

Correction GS editor now keeps MHC ICC profile active (swaps to WITHOUT-GS
permutation) so preview shows correction on top of base calibration instead
of stripping all MHC corrections. Added corrGsPreviewActive flag to let
shader GS pass through MHC suppression while DG stays suppressed.

Fixed stale data on editor close: RegenerateMhcIfActive instead of
SwapMhcToPermutation (which returned cached pre-edit profile). Fixed
UpdateColorCorrectionLive guard to restore shader state regardless of
whether MHC profile existed. Null callback when no live preview to prevent
stale pending queue entries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: transition完全化 v19.14 — ev-add-month border-color + btn-continue filter

①【バグ修正 .ev-add-month】.ev-add-monthのtransitionに
border-color var(--dur-fast) var(--ease-plain)を追加。
:hover時にborder-color: var(--primary)が変化していたが
transitionに含まれておらずborder変化が瞬時スナップしていた
問題を修正。

②【バグ修正 .btn-continue】.btn-continueのtransitionに
filter var(--dur-press)を追加。:active時に
filter: brightness(var(--brightness-press-soft))が適用されていたが
transitionにfilterが含まれておらず、ボタン解放時の
brightness復帰が瞬時スナップしていた問題を修正。

Add Signals panel, Import portfolios, export overhaul, UI refinements

- Signals panel: full signal log across Stocks/ETFs/Baskets with filters,
  sortable table, live price overlay, universe filtering, CSV export
- Import portfolios: paste ticker+weight lists to create custom sidebar
  accordion sections, persisted to localStorage
- Multi-strat bar chart sorted worst-to-best

Export system overhaul:
- Cross/single basket returns: PNG with descriptive labels, y-axis moved right
- Analogs: 3-panel PNG (forward/aggregate) with side panels, summary CSV
- Backtest: full strategy labels on all PNGs, path/multi-strat with legends,
  stats/trades as CSV
- Signals: CSV with filter description

UI changes:
- Header buttons reordered, Cross-Basket renamed to Basket Returns
- Date inputs: smaller font, calendar icon right-aligned
- Signals table row heights matched to accordion

Bug fixes:
- Signal open/closed detection using latest row ground truth
- Live basket signals BasketName vs Ticker column mismatch
- Vectorized signals endpoint (numpy dtype/JSON serialization fixes)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Overhaul intent tree with richer descriptions and examples for better classification

- Greatly expanded domain/category/intent descriptions with wider vocabulary,
  more natural trigger phrases, and explicit edge case disambiguation
- Added 5-6 diverse examples per intent covering colloquial phrasings users
  actually type (not just formal queries)
- Added KEY SIGNALS sections with 15-20 trigger phrases per domain/category
- Added EDGE CASES and DISTINGUISH rules throughout to prevent misclassification
- Strengthened Coding vs Education boundary (write code vs learn concept)
- Strengthened General as absolute last resort with explicit guidance
- More liberal descriptions that cast a wider net per domain/category

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add mic-aware auto-stop via CoreAudio device detection

- Detect mic device usage (not audio levels) to stop TTS
- Uses kAudioDevicePropertyDeviceIsRunningSomewhere
- No speaker bleed false triggers — only activates when mic is opened
- edge-tts with chunked playback for instant start
- Rate +25%, kills previous TTS immediately on new response

operations. Adds an "MCP Authentication" section to SKILL.md between

detection, login steps, and token lifetime.

Closes #13

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Polymarket Gamma API response parsing for NCAA markets

The Gamma public-search API returns a different field format than
assumed: conditionId (not condition_id), outcomePrices as JSON string
(not tokens[].price), clobTokenIds as JSON string (not tokens[].token_id),
outcomes as JSON string, negRisk (not neg_risk).

mapGammaMarket now handles both formats: the old tokens array format
and the new outcomes/outcomePrices/clobTokenIds string format.
Parses JSON string arrays, handles volume as string, and correctly
extracts Yes/No prices and token IDs from either format.

commit.message:
feat(actions): fire hold action during key press instead of on release

Spawn a timer thread on key_down that fires the hold action after the
threshold elapses while the key is still held. Cancel via AtomicBool on
early release. This gives immediate tactile feedback instead of waiting
for key_up.

repository.description: A Streamdeck Plugin to easier map Star Citizen actions

commit.message:
feat(bindings): add TOML generator config, mtime polling watcher, and category overrides

Replace the `notify`-based file watcher with mtime polling to avoid
Windows ReadDirectoryChangesW reliability issues. The watcher now reloads
bindings directly instead of delegating via a topic. Add a TOML-based
generator config system for customising candidate keys, deny combos, and
category groups. Support ignoring user binds and add category overrides
to fix maps with missing UICategory (e.g. vehicle_mfd).

commit.message:
fix: add fallback scraper for all insider datasets + never cache empty

1. insiderLatest and insiderTopWeek now have direct URL scrape
   fallbacks (same pattern as insiderTopOwner already had).
   When finvizfinance library returns empty, BeautifulSoup
   scrapes the page directly.

2. Never cache empty results — if Finviz returns 0 trades,
   don't store it so next request retries fresh.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add Sentry error tracking for production monitoring

- Install Sentry.AspNetCore 5.10.0
- builder.WebHost.UseSentry(): DSN from config/env, 10% trace sample rate,
  MinimumEventLevel=Error, Environment set from ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT
  InitializeSdk=false when DSN is blank so local dev stays silent
- app.UseSentryTracing() added after UseCors for distributed tracing
- ExceptionMiddleware: SentrySdk.CaptureException(ex) on 500s only —
  expected 4xx (ArgumentException, NotFoundException, etc.) are skipped
  to keep the error budget focused on genuine bugs
- SentryUserContextMiddleware: runs after UseAuthorization, attaches
  SentryUser (Id + Email) and user.role tag to every event for authenticated
  requests so errors can be searched/filtered by user in the dashboard
- appsettings.json: "Sentry": { "Dsn": "" } placeholder added
  Production: set SENTRY__DSN environment variable on Railway

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add DB-level pagination to admin and user-facing list endpoints

All changes push Skip/Take to the database — no in-memory slicing.

Admin endpoints (direct DB queries)
- GET /admin/users        → page=1, limit=50 (max 100), returns PaginatedResult<UserDto>
- GET /admin/suppliers    → page=1, limit=50 (max 100), returns PaginatedResult<SupplierDto>
  · order stats query scoped to current page only (was fetching all suppliers)
- GET /admin/audit-log    → default limit raised to 100, returns PaginatedResult<AuditLogDto>
  (was already paginated with anonymous object; now uses typed PaginatedResult)

Service-backed endpoints (pagination pushed into service layer)
- IBookingService.GetAllAsync      → PaginatedResult<BookingDto>(page, limit)
- IOrderService.GetAllAsync        → PaginatedResult<OrderDto>(page, limit)
- INotificationService.GetAllAsync → PaginatedResult<NotificationDto>(page, limit)
All three: CountAsync() before Skip/Take; max limit clamped to 100.

Controllers updated: BookingsController, OrdersController, NotificationsController
  accept ?page=1&limit=50; omitting params uses defaults (backward-compatible).

Tests: BookingServiceTests updated (.Data.HaveCount / .Data.Single) — 52/52 pass.
